nodes.name: Setup Email Campaign
nodes.notes: Demo-safe email branch. Catches channel failures and returns a structured partial-success/failed status instead of hiding other branch results. In production, replace with connector/API nodes using the supplied idempotency key and retry policy.

nodes.name: Setup Ads
nodes.notes: Demo-safe ads branch. Catches channel failures and returns a structured partial-success/failed status instead of hiding other branch results. In production, replace with connector/API nodes using the supplied idempotency key and retry policy.

nodes.name: Setup CRM Campaign
nodes.notes: Demo-safe crm branch. Catches channel failures and returns a structured partial-success/failed status instead of hiding other branch results. In production, replace with connector/API nodes using the supplied idempotency key and retry policy.

nodes.name: Notify Internal Comms
nodes.notes: Demo-safe internal_comms branch. Catches channel failures and returns a structured partial-success/failed status instead of hiding other branch results. In production, replace with connector/API nodes using the supplied idempotency key and retry policy.

nodes.name: Prepare Campaign Control
nodes.notes: Adds campaign-level control metadata: campaign ID, per-channel idempotency keys, and a documented retry policy for production connector/API nodes.

nodes.name: Log Final Output (demo)
nodes.notes: Demo audit checkpoint. In production replace or extend with a database, object storage, Google Drive, Notion, Sheets, or ticketing node.
